evidence.snippet: ARRIS developed Additive Molding, a patented technology for manufacturing 3D-aligned continuous fiber thermoplastic composite parts at scale.

Drone & Government
Realizing the next generation of high-performance product architectures.

items.notes: ARRIS supplies 3D-aligned continuous fiber thermoplastic composite structural parts to drone and other manufacturers via their Additive Molding™ platform. Drone & Government is listed as an explicit industry target. The drone-government industry page was skipped, limiting confirmation of specific drone parts.

evidence.snippet: Founded in 2017, ARRIS® is a global manufacturing technology leader headquartered in Berkeley, California. Our revolutionary design, materials, and manufacturing platform lets brands completely reimagine their products. We simultaneously leverage the highest strength and stiffness-to-weight carbon fiber composites, the game-changing functionality of integrated electronics, and the task-specific properties of metals, resins, and other materials.

Drone & Government
Realizing the next generation of high-performance product architectures.

The team of experts supports industries including aerospace, defense, automotive, portable electronics, bicycles, and footwear, helping partners turn ambitious ideas into manufacturable, high-performance products. In parallel, ARRIS also brings select innovations directly to consumers — showcasing what’s possible when advanced composites, real engineering, and thoughtful design come together.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: ARRIS supplies composite structural parts (made via Additive Molding™) to drone/aerospace customers. They have a dedicated 'Drone & Government' industry page, though it was skipped by the crawler. Their composite parts are raw structural inputs to drone airframes, not complete platforms.

items.name: Additive Molding™
items.product_type: continuous fiber composite manufacturing technology platform
items.notes: Patented software, materials, and high-volume production platform; primary deliverable for aerospace/drone customers is custom composite structural parts made with this technology.

evidence.snippet:
#### ARRIS | MTO Carbon Fiber Spokes
Much lighter than today’s best metal aero spokes and tuned for unmatched ride feel — explore the next generation of thermoplastic carbon fiber spokes in a growing product series.

#### AURORRA By ARRIS Super Insoles
The first legit super insole built with world-class materials. Marathon tech for everyday wear — easing pain from your feet to your knees to your lower back, cutting fatigue and boosting energy.

products.notes: ARRIS also produces custom composite parts for drones/aerospace under contract, but these are not named consumer SKUs. The drone-government page was skipped and may reference specific drone structural part offerings.

evidence.snippet: Production Ready: Repeatable process, reliable equipment
Meet the highest-volume production requirements with an advanced manufacturing process that’s cost-effective and scalable by design.

readiness.notes: ARRIS claims 'Production Ready: Repeatable process, reliable equipment' and targets 'highest-volume production requirements'. Commercial partnerships (e.g. Specialized bicycle wheels) confirm production-scale deliveries.

tagline: Develops patented Additive Molding™ technology for continuous-fiber thermoplastic composite aerostructures and components serving drone and government programs. Berkeley-based supplier offers design optimization software and production-ready composite parts. NDAA compliance and Blue UAS certification status not publicly confirmed; limited public evidence of specific government contracts or program wins.
